metadata.title: Free Photo Restoration Online - Restore Old Photos with AI | Toolaze
metadata.description: Restore old photos online free with AI. Remove scratches, dust, and noise, improve clarity, and colorize old photos in one click. No sign-up required.

hero.desc: Restore old photos in one click with AI. Remove scratches, dust, and noise, improve details, and apply natural color restoration automatically.

howToUse.title: How to Restore Old Photos Online

steps.title: Upload Your Photo
steps.desc: Upload one old photo in JPG, JPEG, or PNG format (up to 30MB).

steps.title: Generate Restored Result
steps.desc: Click Generate to run restoration with built-in colorization for a clean and vivid old-photo result.

steps.title: Generate and Download
steps.desc: Click Generate to restore your photo, preview the result, and download instantly.

items.title: Scratch and Dust Cleanup
items.desc: Automatically removes common old-photo damage like scratches, dust spots, and noise.

items.title: Clarity and Detail Boost
items.desc: Improves sharpness and visual detail so faces, textures, and edges look cleaner.

items.title: Built-In Color Restoration
items.desc: Restoration and colorization run together with one fixed workflow for consistent output quality.

items.title: Single-Image Workflow
items.desc: Focused one-photo workflow for fast restoration with simple controls.

items.title: Fast Browser Experience
items.desc: Upload, restore, and download in a clean browser-based flow with no sign-up required.

items.title: Secure Processing
items.desc: Images are processed securely and not kept as permanent account files.

content.title: Make Old Photos Usable Again
content.text: Old family photos often have scratches, dust, fading, and blur that make them hard to share or print. Toolaze Photo Restoration helps you recover visual quality quickly so memories look cleaner and easier to preserve.

content.title: One-Click Workflow for Faster Results
content.text: The page uses a fixed restoration plus colorization workflow, so you do not need to decide settings. Upload one image, click Generate, and get a clean enhanced result quickly.

content.title: Built for Everyday Users, Not Editors
content.text: You do not need manual masking, brush tools, or advanced editing skills. Upload one image, choose your mode, click generate, and download. It is designed for fast personal use, family archives, and social sharing.

scenes.title: Family Memory Recovery
scenes.desc: Clean old family photos before printing, framing, or sharing in family groups.

scenes.title: Historical and Archive Cleanup
scenes.desc: Improve readability of old scanned photos for archive projects or school presentations.

scenes.title: Social Media Throwback Posts
scenes.desc: Restore old portraits and moments so they look better in modern social feeds.

rating.title: Trusted by Creators and Families
rating.text: Toolaze helps users restore old photos quickly with simple controls and clean results. No registration required.

faq.q: Is this photo restoration tool free to use?
faq.a: Yes. You can restore photos online for free on Toolaze with no sign-up required.
You can upload JPG, JPEG, and PNG images up to 30MB.

faq.q: Can I choose whether to colorize old photos?
faq.a: No. This page uses a fixed restoration plus colorization workflow by default to keep results consistent.

faq.q: Does this support batch photo restoration?
faq.a: No. This page supports single-image restoration per run.
No. Prompt text is built in to keep the workflow simple and consistent.

faq.q: Do I need to install software?
faq.a: No. Toolaze runs online so you can upload, restore, and download from the web interface.
